summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Amplius Aggressive Asset Allocation ETF (AAAA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target risk asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed, multi-asset fund that allocates between 60% and 100% of its assets in global equity investments, with the remaining portion invested in fixed income and/or downside protection ETFs. AAAA was launched on Jul 16, 2025 and is issued by Amplius.
